title: Ranking The Top 5 Worst Californians
key_points:
Let's rank the top five worst people
that negatively [music] impacted the
state of California. I don't know where
Newsom ranks, whether he's number one or
not, but he's one of the five [music]
worst people that hurt the state of
California. Why? Every year the state
has lost people. Maybe it's because
homelessness, 46 out of 10,000 people in
the state of California are homeless,
and it's climbing. [music] Are people
leaving to another state? Oh, they're
leaving because they're greedy
capitalists don't want to pay taxes. Oh,
really? Maybe it's because he sucks as a
governor
